title: Daewoo Health Grill & Panini Press, 750W Electric Non-Stick Sandwich Maker with Floating Hinged Lid, Open Flat Grill, Drip Tray – Compact Tabletop Press for Meat, Veg & Toasties
seller_info_text: Sold by Amazon Resale and Fulfilled by Amazon.
features: Versatile 2-in-1 Grill & Press – Whether you’re craving crispy paninis, grilled meat, or charred vegetables, this compact health grill transforms from a sandwich press to a flat tabletop grill with its 180° opening design

Compact & Efficient 750W Power – Ideal for quick weekday lunches or weekend brunches, the high-performance 750W element heats fast and maintains optimal temperature with handy Power and Ready indicators
Adjustable Floating Lid – Accommodates thick or thin foods while ensuring even cooking. Great for stacked sandwiches or perfectly grilled chicken breasts with golden sear marks
Non-Stick Cooking Plates & Drip Tray – Cook with confidence and clean up in seconds thanks to the dual non-stick plates and integrated drip tray that collects excess oils
Safe & User-Friendly Design – Cool-touch handle, rubber feet for stability, and auto temperature regulation ensure safe, hassle-free use in any home kitchen
description: From the manufacturer OPEN OR CLOSED The mini Panini press is versatile in that it can be used open to 90 or 180 degrees like a grill or closed for sandwich making as a traditional Panini press. NON-STICK EASY CLEAN The mini Panini press has marble coated non-stick plates for hassle free cooking and easy clean surfaces when you have finished. LIGHT INDICATORS The mini Panini press has indicator lights that let you know when the power is on and also lights up to indicate when the plates are up to temperature and ready for cooking. SKID RESISTANT FEET The skid resistant feet on the mini Panini press keep it stable and safe when you are opening or closing the lid during use.
